3108560.name: Mystery House
3108560.description:
Step into the shadows of Mystery House—a chilling homage of the groundbreaking Roberta Williams classic that gave birth to the graphical adventure genre. What begins as a nostalgic game night among eight friends in an abandoned mansion quickly descends into a waking nightmare.

The house is no ordinary relic of the past. Its walls breathe with secrets. Its rooms are veiled in puzzles. And something—or someone—doesn’t want you to leave alive.

Choose your perspective: move through the mansion’s haunted halls in immersive first-person, or take a calculated step back in third-person as the tension mounts. Every door you open, every corner you turn, could bring you closer to the truth—or seal your fate.

Mystery House is more than a tribute. It’s a descent into a beautifully twisted 3D world where the line between play and peril dissolves—and only the most perceptive will survive what lies within.

The gates of Mystery House creak open, and you—grandchild of the legendary detective —have been invited to play a game. But this is no ordinary game. What begins in jest quickly spirals into something far more sinister.

As you explore the sprawling estate, you’ll uncover cryptic clues, solve twisted puzzles, and unravel a dark legacy that refuses to stay buried. The deeper you go, the more the truth claws its way out—and the clearer it becomes: this isn’t a game. It’s real.

And it wants you dead.

You’ll need every ounce of wit, courage, and intuition to survive the night, expose the secrets hidden within these walls, and escape with your life intact.

  • Choose Your View of the Nightmare
    Seamlessly shift between immersive first-person and strategic third-person perspectives. Each angle reveals different truths—and dangers—hidden within the mansion’s shadowy halls.

  • A Legacy Unearthed
    Inspired by the original Mystery House, this reimagining weaves a deeper, modern narrative, complete with voice acting and cinematic moments that draw you into a tale of secrets, betrayal, and survival.

  • Every Room Tells a Story
    Step inside a richly detailed 3D world where every creaking floorboard, flickering light, and forgotten object adds to the chilling atmosphere of the estate.

  • Mind Over Terror
    Put your logic and detective instincts to the test with intricate puzzles that don’t just challenge you—they evolve with the story and deepen the mystery.

  • Touch the Past
    Interact with relics, notes, and artifacts throughout the mansion. Some may hold clues… others, warnings.

  • Sound That Follows You
    A haunting, dynamic soundtrack composed by award winning composer Dan Policar (The Crimson Diamond) shapes itself to your experience—building tension, guiding emotion, and breathing life into every dark corridor.

  • A Virtual Reality Experience

    An immersive experience for all your senses when you put on your PC connected VR headset.

  • Uncover Every Corner
    Explore the mansion at your own pace, searching through forgotten rooms, hidden passages, and long-sealed spaces. Every shadow hides a clue. Every drawer could reveal the truth—or something worse.

  • Tools of Survival
    Collect, inspect, and combine key items using a streamlined inventory system designed to blend seamlessly into your investigation. Sometimes the smallest object is the key to escape.

  • Your Choices Shape the Nightmare
    Every decision matters. With multiple endings shaped by the clues you find and the paths you choose, each playthrough offers new twists, new truths, and new terrors.

Prepare for a journey into the unknown—where every room tells a story, and some stories refuse to stay buried. "Mystery House" isn’t just a game... it’s a descent into something you won’t forget.
3108560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
